examples: Promote materialist dialectics and oppose metaphysics and scholasticism.
This is a heated debate which involves materialist as opposed to idealist views.
Unfortunately, in our western tradition, neither materialist nor idealist theoreticians give enough consideration to this basic condition for life.
Darwin himself was deeply troubled by his materialist thoughts and what they meant.
Mr Solzhenitsyn is an old-fashioned, God-fearing romantic: anti-industrial, anti-materialist, anti-Enlightenment, and against what he sees as the deadening excesses of rationalism.
